{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323004106DB7E9FDB7303692913FA"}"},"total":143},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614838356338017048","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完了，不得不说，剧情，打斗场景，境界划分我个人觉得挺不错的，非常清晰，没有给我那种混乱的感觉，作者大大文笔挺六啊，希望作者大大继续加油！！！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772970420,"group_id":"7395832833450724376","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N40py7XkG01Pa4n8YTAKoaV6TcmAUQkHpXCWyujcRDrg","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1520002553349401","user_name":"枫༄༅♥"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1520002553349401","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7395832833450724376","book_info":{"abstract":"【龙珠+原著+多女主+无敌流】
穿越悟空小时候，重新走一遍成长之路。
悟空的成长充满了欢乐，但也伴随着巨大的困难，这一次，将不再有困难，只有欢乐！
悟空将不再优柔寡断，也不会忽略家人，更不会失去自我，变成那个“蠢狗空”，实力就是靠一点一滴积累起来的，没有剧情杀，更没有懈怠。
永无止境的的变强，追求更强的对手才是悟空！
（多女主，不喜勿扰，谢谢）
——
